Compare one metric across models

Source: R/compare_models_metric.r
compare_models_metric.Rd

Plot a selected metric across models directly from cal_metrics output.

Usage

compare_models_metric(
  metric_out,
  metric,
  models = NULL,
  depth = NULL,
  metric_instance = NULL
)

Arguments

metric_out

list; output from cal_metrics().

metric

character; metric name to compare (e.g., "Temp_degreeCelcius").

models

character vector; optional subset/order of models to plot. If NULL, all available models for the metric are used.

depth

numeric or character; optional depth selector for depth-resolved metrics. If NULL, first non-datetime value column is used.

metric_instance

character; optional metric instance name when multiple instances exist for the same metric/model.

Value

A list with:

  • plot: ggplot object.

  • data: long-format data used for plotting.

  • used_columns: named character vector of selected value columns per model.

On this page
